title: How to Choose the Right Architect in Hyderabad for Your Dream Home
author: CITRA Associates
primaryKeyword: choose the right architect in Hyderabad
metaDescription: Learn how to choose the right architect in Hyderabad for your dream home. Key questions, credentials, portfolio checks, and red flags every homeowner should know.
excerpt: Choosing the right architect in Hyderabad is the most important decision before construction begins. This guide covers credentials, portfolio evaluation, key questions to ask, red flags to avoid, and why local expertise matters.

faqs.question: How much do architects charge in Hyderabad?
faqs.answer: Architect fees in Hyderabad typically range from 5% to 10% of the total construction cost, depending on the scope of services, project size, and the firm's experience. Some studios charge a flat fee or a per-square-foot rate for straightforward residential projects. Always clarify what is included in the fee before signing.

faqs.question: Is it mandatory to hire a registered architect in Hyderabad?
faqs.answer: Yes. Under the Architects Act 1972, only registered architects can prepare, sign, and submit building plans for GHMC or HMDA approval. Hiring an unregistered person risks rejected permits, illegal construction status, and future resale complications.

faqs.question: How long does it take to design a residential project in Hyderabad?
faqs.answer: A typical residential project in Hyderabad goes through concept, schematic, and working drawing phases that together take 3 to 6 months before construction begins. The timeline depends on the client's decision speed, project complexity, and how quickly statutory approvals are obtained.
